title.en: The Lord of the Ruins said.

content.en:
"Everyone, I need to use your strength, plus the power of the formation, to help me break the barriers of the territorial waters. "

The Lord of the Ruins said.

Breaking down the barriers of territorial waters?

When many bone transformation realms heard this, they were shocked.

There are only two possibilities for breaking the barrier of the boundary gap in territorial waters.

One is to enter the cracks.

However, they didn't know the coordinates of the rift at all, so they couldn't lock it.

Even if it is another part of the Hunhe River Boundary Seam, they can't lock the position now, even if they break the barrier of the territorial sea boundary seam, there is no way to enter that Hunhe River Boundary Seam!

Moreover, entering the rift of the Hunhe River is not good for the Lord of the Ruins.

The ruins are all cracked in the territorial sea boundary, and it is impossible for the lord of the ruins to want to return to the Hunhe boundary crack.

Then there is only one possibility left.

"Lord of the Ruins, you want to open up and go to the Eternal Beyond the Rift?"

The True Dragon Lord of the True Dragon Cave Heaven was shocked.

"Yes!" the Lord of the Ruins nodded, "I want to infiltrate the land of eternity, and only there can I easily find the resources that allow me to break through." If you wait in the boundary of territorial waters, you don't know how many long years it will take to find such resources. "

"What is the Land of Eternity?"

Ye Tian's vest, the water master asked curiously.

The Lord of the Ruins glanced at the Lord of the Water Succession and explained, "The Land of Eternity is what we call the area beyond the Boundary Rift. Of course, it's not that it's taken blindly, but that the area is indeed called that. The boundary seam and the territorial sea are all dependent on the boundary seam of the territorial waters. It is rumored that the boundary gap of the territorial sea was originally a pole, and the territorial sea and the boundary gap continued to merge into this pole, forming the boundary gap of the territorial waters. After a long time, the boundary between the territorial waters is so vast. "

"Whether it's the boundary rift of the territorial sea or the boundary rift, it is extremely difficult to get to the land beyond eternity. Especially the Boundary Rift, if you want to enter the land of eternity from the Boundary Rift, the price you pay will be terrifying. "

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately extremely puzzled.

"Why is it that the price to pay is greater when entering the land of eternity from the boundary rift?

Ye Tian wondered.

The Lord of the Ruins smiled and said, "Lord of the Water Inheritance, the Boundary Rift of the Territorial Sea is the same as the Boundary Rift, but the suppression of the Boundary Rift on the Eternal Shore is even greater, and even the Boundary Rift will be broken after a long time. It can also be said that the land beyond the eternal shore is very unfair to our rift. That's why we want to blend in with the seams. Therefore, it is safer and less difficult to sew the land beyond eternity from the boundary of territorial waters. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Not only Ye Tian, but also many bone transformation realms here, and they don't know the situation in the land of eternity.

Therefore, the Lord of the Ruins also spoke about the situation in the land of eternity.

"I don't know anything about the land beyond eternity, because I haven't been there either. But in a long time ago, a group of bone transformation realms of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift tried to enter the land of eternity, and paid a great price, almost causing the Hunhe River Boundary Rift to collapse. Moreover, only one came back alive, bringing some information. "

"As for how much of this information is very, I'm not sure. "

"According to those messages, the land of the Eternal Shores is boundless and dangerous, and even gives birth to some special worlds. The personalities of these worlds are no less than the boundary rift and the territorial sea boundary rift, but they also have more resources. "

"Of course, there is an eternal true beast in the land of eternity. The strength of each Eternal True Beast is comparable to the Bone Transformation Realm, and even if I enter the land of the Eternal Shore, there is a certain danger. "

The Lord of the Ruins said a lot.

Many of the Bone Transformation Realms have gradually gained some understanding of the land beyond eternity.

"Lord of Ruins, can I enter the land of eternity together?"

The Lord of the True Dragon asked.

"Lord of the True Dragon, you want to go in too?" reminded the Lord of the Ruins, "Let me remind you first, even I am not 100% sure that I will come back alive, and if you go to the land of eternity, you may fall." "

"I know. The Lord of the True Dragon said, "I haven't made progress for a long time, and I want to go to the land of eternity to fight." "

"Okay, if we really break the barrier of the territorial waters, then we will enter the land of eternity together. However, we also need other bone transformation realm guards to guard the passage, otherwise we will not be able to come back. In short, once you get something good, you won't forget everyone. The Lord of the Ruins assured.

"Don't worry, we'll definitely guard the passage!"

A bone-changing realm reassured.

After all, it's good for them too.

If the Lord of the Ruins returns alive, more information can be provided.

And, they can reap the benefits too.

Even, in the future, if they want to enter the land of eternity, it will be easier and safer.

So, there's no reason for them to refuse.

......

this day.

The Lord of the Ruins has produced a large number of resources and materials, and has also given many benefits to other bone transformation realms, allowing these bone transformation realms to help arrange magic circles.

They set up this circle on the sea of chaos, and no race was allowed to exist in the surrounding territory, and all of them had to be relocated.

Moreover, they block messages.

Therefore, apart from them, other top overlord-level forces didn't know about this situation at all.

Some time has passed.

The Lord of the Ruins, these Bone Transformation Realms, have finally built a magic circle.

Depending on the circle, the three primeval epochs could be maintained.

In other words, within three primeval eras, if you don't come back, this magic circle passage will collapse.

"Let's get started!"

The main path of the ruins.

A Bone Transformation Realm stood on top of each circle node, and then joined forces to urge this circle.

Bang!!!!!!

A terrifying attack erupted from the circle, tearing through the barrier of the boundary of the territorial waters.

With the assistance of the Lord of the Ruins' many bone transformation realms, the barrier was finally broken and a passage was formed.

This passage is the place that connects to the other side of eternity.

Then.

There was an impact from the land of the Eternal Shore, which shook one of the bone transformations, and they were injured one by one, but they were basically minor injuries.

"Sure enough, the price paid is not big, in the ancient times when the Hunhe River Boundary was incomparably far away, the price paid was much greater than this!"

The Lord of the Ruins muttered.

He was waiting for the passage to stabilize before entering the land of eternity.

After another period of time, the channel was completely stabilized.

"Lord of the True Dragon, let's go inside, we should go through a shock stream before we can enter the land of eternity. The passage opened from the boundary gap of the territorial sea should not be large, and with our strength, we can naturally easily break through. "The Lord of the Ruins.

"Okay, let's go!"

The Lord of the True Dragon nodded.
